title: PB-152 VERIFIED: Governance Runtime Hardening Blocker Resolution

exact_blocker_source.prior_closure_requirement: Resolve validation/runtime hardening blocker before any extraction.

root_cause.observed_failure: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'cryptography' inside demos/edgeguard/reset_demo.sh subprocess.
root_cause.why_this_caused_hold: The active pytest environment had cryptography installed, but reset_demo.sh invoked hardcoded python3, so the subprocess could use a different interpreter without the required dependency context.

classification.classification_summary: Primary validation gap caused by runtime subprocess interpreter drift. The apparent dependency issue was dependency-context mismatch, not missing dependency declaration. Missing regression coverage allowed the drift to remain unproven. Evidence issue was stale downstream RESOLVED state after the blocker was fixed.

source_branch_delta.reason_pyproject_not_required: The blocker was interpreter context drift. cryptography is already declared in requirements.txt and requirements-ci.txt, so pyproject build-system relaxation is not required to resolve RESOLVED.
